full_description: HabitTracker is an Android app that helps users track and maintain their daily habits. It provides a simple and intuitive way to stay consistent with habits and achieve goals. With HabitTracker, you can easily add, edit, and delete habits, set reminders, and view your progress over time. The app also allows you to customize your habit list, set goals, and track your progress. Whether you want to start a new exercise routine, read more books, or simply drink more water, HabitTracker is the perfect tool to help you stay on track. Download HabitTracker today and start building positive habits that will improve your life.
